subject: Sociology
title: AI and the Future of Learning
description: Learn AI and the Future of Learning in one minute.

hook.text: An AI writes the essay. A student submits it. The professor can't tell. Now what happens to education?

buildup.text: Artificial intelligence is reshaping what skills matter. Memorization fades; critical thinking rises in value.

discovery.text: AI tutors can personalize learning at scale, adapting to each student's pace and style in real time.

twist.text: But AI also threatens to deepen divides. Wealthy schools will use it well; poor schools may lose teachers.

climax.text: AI doesn't end education — it forces a reckoning about what schools are actually for in a thinking-machine age.

punchline.text: Machines learn faster; humans must learn deeper.

quiz.question: How might AI affect educational inequality?
options: Wealthy schools may benefit more, deepening divides
